All right guys, now that we have our acuity and click funnels working, it's time to start linking everything up. So in order to do that, we're going to need a sheet to put all the information on. So in order to get our leads and stat sheet, what we're going to go ahead and do is click on this button here below the video. It's going to bring us up to a portion where we can make a copy of the available sheet. So we're going to click right here. And it's going to go ahead and do that for us. So from here, you're going to want to go ahead and name this sheet, whatever you want. I suggest naming it after your gym and then having leads and stats in the name. I've already done this, so I have my sheet right here, Sabrina's gym leads and stats. And I placed some fake stats in here to give you kind of an idea of how the sheet should be used. So the first thing you might notice is that there are three tabs at the bottom. So we have a tracking tab, stats and incoming leads. So the tracking tab is only editable from G to the right, from F into the left if you try to edit the sheet on this tab particularly, it will not work. And that's by design. So it's kind of self-explanatory how this should be used. The date, name, email number, appointment if there is one, we'll all auto populate in from Zapier and we'll go over that in our next video. But this portion over here, so showed, sold, amount, deposit and notes are all things that you're going to want to manually put in to track. So showed is going to be whether or not your person showed up to their appointment. Whether or not you sold them, see a check a box if you did. Amount is going to be the total amount of the package that you sold them for. And then the deposit is going to be the number where you're going to put your upfront cash if you do end up taking any deposits. From there, the notes, I highly suggest you use those as personal notes and sales notes. So if you're having trouble with any specific objections or if there's something you're noticing that you might need to work on to better your sales process, these are all good things to place here. And they're also all good things to go over with your gym launch coach. So from here, all of this information is going to populate into the stats. There will be some information that you do need to enter in yourself, but we haven't gotten that far yet. So we're not going to go over that right now. But that would be the ad spend section here and the unique clicks. So this is going to show you people who were scheduled, people that didn't schedule, who showed up, who no showed, and it's going to pull all the information off of the other tab. So from here, we have one last tab to go over, and that's going to be our incoming leads. So when we set up our Zapier, this is actually going to be the tab that all of the information goes to. So with that being said, this is also the only tab that you can edit things on. So in order to edit a person, so obviously none of this information is true, you're just going to highlight it, click to the right, and delete the rows. Do keep in mind that if you delete this, it is gone. So there will be a little reminder that reminds you of this. And then all you'll have to do is click that OK button. So for our next video, we'll go over how to set up a Zapier account, and then we'll go over how to get all the information to populate in without you having to type it. So I'll see you then.
